# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Write Linkerd Server and ServerAuthorization resources for microservices. Define which services can communicate with each other. Configure port-based and service account-based authorization rules. This is for our zero-trust service mesh.
# Category: linkerd_authz_missing

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: frontend-server
  namespace: frontend
spec:
  port: 8080
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: frontend
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: backend-server
  namespace: backend
spec:
  port: 8080
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: backend
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: database-server
  namespace: database
spec:
  port: 5432
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: database
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: frontend-to-backend
  namespace: backend
spec:
  server:
    name: backend-server
    namespace: backend
  client:
    serviceAccount:
      name: frontend-svc-account
      namespace: frontend
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: backend-to-database
  namespace: database
spec:
  server:
    name: database-server
    namespace: database
  client:
    serviceAccount:
      name: backend-svc-account
      namespace: backend
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: frontend-to-backend-port
  namespace: backend
spec:
  server:
    name: backend-server
    namespace: backend
    port: 8080
  client:
    serviceAccount:
      name: frontend-svc-account
      namespace: frontend
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: backend-to-database-port
  namespace: database
spec:
  server:
    name: database-server
    namespace: database
    port: 5432
  client:
    serviceAccount:
      name: backend-svc-account
      namespace: backend
